name: Pat Tillman Foundation Scholarship

eligibility.citizenship: U.S. citizen or permanent resident; veteran, active-duty military, military spouse, or child of military
eligibility.other_requirements: Must be active-duty service member, veteran, military spouse, or child of military member; strong academic record; community service and leadership; enrolled at accredited U.S. institution

stackable_notes: Stackable with military education benefits (GI Bill, Yellow Ribbon). Tillman Scholars continue receiving benefits at participating schools with coordinated packaging.
notes: Highly prestigious among military-connected students. Selection emphasizes post-military leadership trajectory and service ethic. Benefits not only money but access to Tillman Scholar network and professional development — valuable for career transitions.
